content.body: annevk: I think me and mfreed agree on a set of changes to `popover=hint`, so it'd be good to get some WebKit thoughts on it at today's WHATNOT. It's part of Interop, but I don't think WebKit have started work on it.
content.formatted_body: annevk: I think me and mfreed agree on a set of changes to popover=hint, so it'd be good to get some WebKit thoughts on it at today's WHATNOT. It's part of Interop, but I don't think WebKit have started work on it.

content.body: Jake Archibald: I suspect that should be fine. Pointer?
content.formatted_body: Jake Archibald: I suspect that should be fine. Pointer?

content.body: I don't think I'll be able to make it today, but popover=hint changes seem okay. I do think we need to have agreed specification changes in soon though.
